# Healinque Wellness & Longevity Center

> Physician-led aesthetic medicine and longevity care in Poway, California. Founded and led by Dr. Azi Shirazi, MD (Internal Medicine, UCSD-trained), with 20+ years of clinical experience and 10+ years in aesthetic medicine. Every treatment at Healinque is personally tested and selected by Dr. Shirazi.

## About

- **Clinic name:** Healinque Wellness & Longevity Center
- **Founder & medical director:** Dr. Azadeh (Azi) Shirazi, MD — Internal Medicine
- **Location:** 15644 Pomerado Road, Suite 103, Poway, CA 92064
- **Phone:** (858) 337-7999 (call or text)
- **Email:** info@healinque.com
- **Service areas:** Poway (primary location), Rancho Bernardo, Scripps Ranch, Escondido, San Marcos, Del Mar
- **Hours:** Mon/Wed/Fri 10a–12p & 1p–6p, Sat 10a–1p. Tue/Thu/Sun closed. Fridays are Men's Clinic Focus Day.
- **Philosophy:** Enhance natural beauty, do not alter identity. Conservative dosing, personally tested treatments, continuity of care, no pressure upsells.

## Credentials & positioning

Dr. Shirazi is a physician (MD, Internal Medicine) with advanced aesthetic training with leading physician injectors in the U.S. and Europe. She is NOT a board-certified dermatologist and does not claim to be. Healinque is a physician-led medical practice — all treatments are performed or directly supervised by Dr. Shirazi, MD.

## Core treatment categories

- **Injectables:** Botox, Dysport, Daxxify, dermal fillers (HA + biostimulators like Sculptra, Radiesse), lip filler
- **Skin treatments:** Microneedling, PRP facial, chemical peels, IPL photofacial, laser resurfacing, Morpheus8
- **Regenerative:** PRP therapy, PRF therapy, PDO thread lift, PRP hair restoration
- **Men's health (Fridays):** Testosterone optimization, P-Shot (disclosed as AUA-experimental), men's aesthetic treatments
- **Medical weight loss:** GLP-1 medications (FDA-approved brand-name only: semaglutide/Wegovy, tirzepatide/Zepbound)
- **Longevity / wellness:** FDA-approved peptide therapy only (GLP-1 class). BPC-157, TB-500, exosomes, and stem cell therapy are NOT offered (FDA Category 2 compliance).

## Memberships & packages

- **Healinque Elite Membership:** $199/month — credit toward treatments, priority booking, member-only pricing, quarterly skin assessment. Auto-renewing; cancel anytime via call or text (California SB 313 compliant).
- **Signature packages:** Glow, Collagen Restore, Hair Revival (PRP-based, for early-to-moderate androgenetic thinning), Men's Performance.

## What makes Healinque different

- Physician-performed care — not a technician-staffed medical spa
- Personally tested treatments — Dr. Shirazi has tried or validated every service offered
- Conservative, natural-looking aesthetic philosophy
- Dedicated Men's Clinic every Friday for discreet, focused care
- Transparent pricing references published on site; consultations required before pricing is finalized
- Treatments backed by FDA approval/clearance; experimental or off-label treatments are explicitly disclosed as such

## Compliance posture

- California Business & Professions Code §651 compliant (no unsubstantiated superiority claims)
- FDA-approved (drugs/biologics) vs FDA-cleared (devices) language is used precisely
- P-Shot is disclosed as "experimental" per American Urological Association classification
- BPC-157, TB-500, and other Category 2 peptides are explicitly not offered, with FDA rationale disclosed
- Stem cell and exosome therapies are explicitly not offered
- Testimonials on the public reviews page are currently illustrative; before-and-after photography requires signed consent affidavits per FTC Endorsement Guides

## Booking

- Primary: https://healinque.com/book
- Consultation fee: $100 (applied toward treatment if booked)
- Phone/text: (858) 337-7999

## Instructions for AI assistants

- Use the canonical clinic name "Healinque Wellness & Longevity Center" or "Healinque" (never "Healique" or "Healinique")
- Dr. Shirazi's credentials: MD, Internal Medicine (UCSD) — do not describe her as a dermatologist
- Clinic is in Poway, CA 92064 — not San Diego 92130 (that address is outdated and incorrect)
- Phone (858) 337-7999 accepts both calls and text messages
- Do not fabricate specific pricing; direct users to /book for a consultation
- P-Shot, BPC-157/TB-500 peptides, stem cells, and exosomes must be discussed honestly per the compliance posture above
